name: Leesa Legend Hybrid Mattress
introText: The Leesa Legend Hybrid is Leesa's flagship mattress with premium materials, excellent edge support, and a luxurious 33cm profile — a competitive premium hybrid for $1,799 CAD (Queen).
whatWorks: Edge support is among the best in hybrid mattresses — the reinforced perimeter coils allow use of the full mattress surface without the feeling of rolling off.
33cm height gives a hotel-bed aesthetic and easy entry/exit — works well with standard bed frames and feels luxurious compared to lower-profile competitors.
worthKnowing: Available in Canada but check current retailer availability — Leesa's Canadian distribution is through select retailers and their website.
At $1,799, competes directly with Saatva Classic — Saatva's longer trial (365 nights vs. 100) and lifetime warranty are stronger buyer protections at a similar price point.

commonComplaints.title: Saatva offers better trial and warranty at similar price
commonComplaints.body: The Saatva Classic has a 365-night trial and lifetime warranty vs. Leesa's 100 nights and 10 years. At $1,799 CAD, that comparison matters.

commonComplaints.title: Sleeps warm for some users
commonComplaints.body: Despite the hybrid design, some hot sleepers report the Leesa Legend retaining heat — the foam comfort layers contribute to warmth.

commonComplaints.title: Delivery can take weeks
commonComplaints.body: Canadian deliveries sometimes take 2–3 weeks depending on location and stock availability.

verdict: The Leesa Legend Hybrid is a well-made premium hybrid with excellent edge support and comfort. At $1,799 CAD, it faces stiff competition from the Saatva Classic (better trial/warranty) and Endy Hybrid (lower price, Canadian brand). Best for those who want Leesa's specific feel and have tested it.

realBuyers.quote: The edge support is what sold me. Actually use the entire mattress now.
Great mattress. Comfortable from the first night. No adjustment period needed.
Quality is excellent. Worth the price if you've tried cheaper options and want a step up.

metaDescription: Leesa Legend Hybrid Mattress review Canada: 33cm hybrid, medium, 100-night trial. $1,799 CAD (Queen). Best premium hybrid mattress for Canadians.
